title: Artificial Intelligence Project Manager - Principal AI
description:
Role Purpose

The Principal AI Engineer will lead the development of in-house AI capabilities within the marine domain. This role involves establishing and managing a dedicated AI team to design, execute, and oversee AI-related projects. The position also requires close collaboration with other engineering and transformation functions—including Digitalization, Yard Transformation, Continuous Improvement, and Technology & Innovation—to drive organizational advancement through AI solutions.


Key Responsibilities


Leadership & Team Management

  • Lead and mentor a small team of AI engineers, providing guidance in technical areas, project execution, and stakeholder communication.
  • Foster collaboration across internal departments and external partners to ensure project alignment and delivery.

Project Oversight

  • Manage end-to-end AI projects, from planning and development to deployment and evaluation.
  • Coordinate with relevant stakeholders to ensure smooth execution and timely completion.

AI Model Development

  • Design, build, and deploy machine learning and deep learning models to address complex operational and business challenges.

System Operations

  • Maintain and optimize AI systems for reliability, scalability, and performance.
  • Implement monitoring and version control for deployed AI solutions.

Data Management

  • Collect, preprocess, and analyze data to support model training, validation, and continuous improvement.

Collaboration & Integration

  • Work with data scientists, software engineers, and business teams to integrate AI capabilities into existing systems and processes.

Innovation & Continuous Learning

  • Stay informed on the latest AI and ML technologies and apply best practices to enhance internal AI frameworks and methodologies.

Skills & Knowledge

  • Proven leadership experience managing small technical teams (2–3 engineers).
  • Proficiency in programming languages such as Python, R, or Java.
  • Strong understanding of machine learning, deep learning, NLP, and computer vision.
  • Experience with data management, system integration, and software version control.
  • Familiarity with visualization tools (e.g., Microsoft Power BI) is advantageous.
  • Strong communication and stakeholder management skills.
  • Ability to work both independently and collaboratively in cross-functional settings.

Experience & Qualifications

  • Master’s or Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related discipline.
  • Hands-on experience leading AI/ML projects, preferably in a corporate or industrial environment.
  • Demonstrated capability in system deployment, monitoring, and maintenance.
  • Experience in project management is a plus.


Location: West (transport provided island-wide)

Working Hours: 7:25 AM – 5:00 PM


(EA Reg No: 20C0312)

Please email a copy of your detailed resume to kayla@talentsis.com.sg for immediate processing.

Only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

  2. Executive Search
  3. Headhunting
  4. Contract & Flexible Staffing
  5. Manpower Outsourcing
  6. Reskilling & Upskilling
  7. HR Consultancy & Advisory Service


(EA Reg No: 20C0312)
